query: Upgrade my Docker Compose based 3x-ui to the latest version safely.
expected_behavior: Backs up the database and certificates first (the ./db/ and ./cert/ volumes, or x-ui.db) before upgrading
Records the current image tag or version so the upgrade can be rolled back
Upgrades with docker compose pull followed by docker compose up -d, reusing the same ./db/ and ./cert/ volumes
Verifies afterward via /panel/api/server/status, checks that inbound/client counts are unchanged, and re-tests one client link
Treats database import/restore as a high-risk action that needs explicit confirmation
